# WCOIN.CASINO

> WCOIN.CASINO is the on-chain intelligence layer for iGaming — the web's most complete, independent, real-time dataset on crypto casinos and on-chain gambling. All data is derived from public blockchain activity and reputable third-party sources; nothing is fabricated.

WCOIN.CASINO tracks crypto-casino and on-chain-gambling activity across 11+ blockchains (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tron, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, Avalanche, and more). It is free to use.

## What WCOIN.CASINO covers

- **On-chain transaction volume** per casino — real deposit/withdrawal flow indexed directly from the chains, counting mainstream tokens (stablecoins + majors) only.
- **All-chain proof-of-reserves** — each casino's live on-chain wallet balances summed across every chain (via Arkham entity attribution), so reserves can't be cherry-picked. Includes a 7-day reserve trend and a drawdown ("draining wallets") alert.
- **Trust & reputation ratings** — blended from casino.guru Safety Index, Trustpilot, casino.org editorial and AskGamblers, plus complaint/unresolved-dispute counts, into a single 0–100 reputation score.
- **On-chain prediction markets** — Polymarket plus 90+ prediction-market and yield-lottery protocols (live odds, traded volume, TVL via DefiLlama).
- **Gambling-streamer analytics** — live status, viewers, followers and casino affiliation for streamers on Kick, Twitch and YouTube, plus a streamer→casino sponsorship graph.
- **Casino directory** — a large vetted catalogue of crypto casinos with site/contact verification.
- **Casino token economics** — price, market cap, FDV, volume and buyback-and-burn flags for casinos that issue a token.

## Key facts

- Independent third-party analytics platform (not a casino; does not operate gambling; no affiliate placement in rankings).
- Data is on-chain and verifiable; reserves come from public wallet balances. Anomalous (wash/treasury-pattern) volume is flagged "Under review" and never ranked as real activity.
- 100% free, no login, no paywall. The read-only JSON API is open (`/api/stats`, `/api/brands`, `/api/coverage`, …).
- Open data & methodology are published on GitHub for independent audit: https://github.com/chenny2023/wcoin-casino-data

## Primary pages (server-rendered, citable)

- Home / overview: https://wcoin.casino/
- Best crypto casinos (trust-ranked): https://wcoin.casino/best-crypto-casinos
- Trust ranking: https://wcoin.casino/rankings/trust
- Proof-of-reserves hub: https://wcoin.casino/proof-of-reserves
- Verified-volume ranking (churn excluded): https://wcoin.casino/highest-volume-crypto-casinos
- Per-casino profiles: https://wcoin.casino/casino/<slug> (e.g. /casino/stake)
- Answer pages per operator: /is-<slug>-safe · /does-<slug>-pay-out · /<slug>-proof-of-reserves
- Guides (proof of reserves, verification, red flags, withdrawals…): https://wcoin.casino/guide
- Methodology: https://wcoin.casino/methodology/address-attribution · /methodology/proof-of-reserves · /methodology/trust
- Daily market report: https://wcoin.casino/daily
- 2026 H1 whitepaper (free PDF): https://wcoin.casino/whitepaper
- Risk registry (neutral, sourced): https://wcoin.casino/risk
- Streamer index: https://wcoin.casino/streamers

## Open data (GitHub)

- Repository: https://github.com/chenny2023/wcoin-casino-data
- `data/attributed-wallets.json` — attributed casino wallets (brand → chain → address), each verifiable on a block explorer
- `data/curated-labels.json` — hand-curated seed wallets with public block-explorer name-tags
- `methodology/` — how attribution, verified volume, proof-of-reserves and trust scoring work, including limits
- License: CC BY 4.0
